definition: collection of qualifiers to specify the meaning of properties and other data element types or of its instanciated values

definition_ml.en: collection of qualifiers to specify the meaning of properties and other data element types or of its instanciated values

note:
NOTE 1 Qualifiers are intended to specify the meaning of properties and other data element types or of its instanciated values. In many cases this specification is essential for the correct interpretation of the value. Example: The value associated during the product life cycle stage “as designed” can well differ from the value during the stage “as built”.
NOTE 2 Association of qualifiers to values is not an activity performed in the dictionary but is rather performed by an application. By providing qualifier objects in the dictionary the application can select terms or values from predefined, standardized terms for qualifiers. Such qualifiers can provide information such as status data or lifecycle data.

note_ml.en:

NOTE 2 Association of qualifiers to values is not an activity performed in the dictionary but is rather performed by an application. By providing qualifier objects in the dictionary the application can select terms or values from predefined, standardized terms for qualifiers. Such qualifiers can provide information such as status data or lifecycle data.
